component.name: VOCO
component.summary: A voice-native interface layer designed for speed and precision

description.p: VOCO is a Linux desktop dictation tool for people who want fast voice capture without handing speech data to a cloud service.
It stays in the tray, listens on demand, keeps visible state compact, and defaults to a local-first workflow for voice capture.

ul.li: Tray-first workflow with a compact command panel
Onboarding for microphone setup, hotkeys, and voice profile selection
GitHub Release update checks for manual install channels
Clear Linux-specific install, upgrade, and troubleshooting guidance

description.p: Initial VOCO-branded release with onboarding, update awareness, and Linux packaging groundwork.
